name: PER_WORKING_HOUR_PATTERNS_F_
description: This table contains Work Hour Patterns data.

columns.Name: WORKING_HOUR_PATTERN_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies person holding the Working Hour Patterns.

columns.Name: OBJECT
columns.Comments: The module, with which the Working Hour Patterns functionality is integrated.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the module, with which the Working Hour Patterns functionality is integrated.

columns.Name: WORKING_HOURS_TYPE
columns.Comments: The Working Hours type  None, Frequency, Work Week.

columns.Name: MON_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Monday's Starting Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: TUE_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Tueday's Starting Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: WED_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Wednesday's Starting Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: THU_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Thursday's Starting Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: FRI_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Friday's Starting Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: SAT_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Saturday's Starting Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: SUN_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Sunday's Starting Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: MON_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Monday's Ending Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: TUE_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Tuesday's Ending Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: WED_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Wednesday's Ending Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: THU_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Thursday's Ending Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: FRI_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Friday's Ending Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: SAT_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Saturday's Ending Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: SUN_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Sunday's Ending Time in 24 hrs format HH:mm

columns.Name: MON_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked on Monday.

columns.Name: TUE_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked on Tuesday.

columns.Name: WED_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked on Wednesday.

columns.Name: THU_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked on Thursday.

columns.Name: FRI_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked on Friday.

columns.Name: SAT_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked on Saturday.

columns.Name: SUN_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked on Sunday.

columns.Name: TOTAL_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total hours worked in one week,month,etc.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_START_DAY
columns.Comments: Default Start Day for a week,month,etc.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: WORK_SHIFT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The work shift type can be Time or Elapsed. For the work week, if the shift type is Time, the user must enter a start time and end time. If the shift type is Elapsed, the user must enter the number of hours.

columns.Name: WORK_DAY_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Work day definition identifier. This column is the foreign key for table HWM_WORK_DAY_DEF_B.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
